examples: Finally, the fratricidal price wars led to the short-lived brand of Pharmaceuticals in China.
Their music is an ominous reflection of the twentieth century's last European fratricidal war of ideologies.
We may see stories about fratricidal civil wars, both in the United States and in invented lands, and stories in which next-door neighbors do not even share a common language.
But boardroom fights, shareholder lawsuits and even fratricidal competition are the stuff of capitalism.
History teaches that, with fratricidal division, much can change in a short time.
